calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant Default Pursuant To 585(D) (Motions)
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for request for default judgment against defendant Kizor L&L, Inc. aka Muteki Inc. DBA Kibatsu.

Dept: 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:36:49 a.m. and concluding at 9:40:05 a.m. (D505)

Ashley Mulhorn, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Advance Restaurant Finance, LLC.
Defendant Kizor L&L, Inc. aka Muteki Inc. DBA Kibatsu not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for money field Jan-13-2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant served on Feb-22-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant on Apr-17-2023.
Dismissal filed as to Defendant Does 1 through 10 on Nov-09-2023.

Counsel to summarize the causes of action and to discuss the prayer in the complaint.
The Court takes judicial notice of exhibits filed with the court.
The Court having reviewed the complaint, the prayer amount comports to the proposed judgment.

Based on the statements made, the exhibits and declaration submitted, the Court finds that the plaintiff has proven its prima facie case.

The Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant the following:
Damages $72,977.50
Attorney's Fees $0
Interest $0
Costs $0
Total Judgment $72,977.50

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-29-2024 Continued To Jun-05-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2024 Continued To Mar-27-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant Default Pursuant To 585(D); Declaration Of Angela A. Velen; Declaration Of Vince Monard In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a motion to enter Default Judgment as to Defendant Kizor L&L, Inc. aka Muteki Inc. dba Kibatsu

Dept.505: Judge: Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Pliego; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:11:41 a.m. and concluding at 9:13:58 a.m.(D505)

Ashley Mulhorn, Esq. specially appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Advance Restaurant Finance, LLC via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Kizor L&L, Inc. aka Muteki Inc. dba Kibatsu not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for common counts /open book account/collections filed January 13,2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Kizor L&L, Inc. aka Muteki Inc. dba Kibatsu filed March 3, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant on April 17, 2023.
Doe Defendants dismissed on November 9, 2023.

The Court having reviewed the CCP 585(d) declaration finds that the declaration is not sufficient to satisfy the request prayed for.

The motion to enter default judgment against Defendant is DENIED without prejudice by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant Default Pursuant To 585(D); Declaration Of Angela A. Velen; Declaration Of Vince Monard In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Continued To Feb-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
